experience.title: Customer Analytics Analyst
achievements: Applied Logistic Regression on ML-labeled call data (VIBE scores), engineering custom features from raw call metrics (handle time, tonality, dead air, talk time) — improved VIBE score from 78% to 81% and reduced Average Handle Time from 370s to 350s
Designed and executed A/B experiment to validate VIBE improvement interventions — confirmed statistical significance of sentiment and efficiency gains against control population
Analyzed large datasets of customer complaints and credit card issues using SQL and Python, surfacing actionable recommendations to senior leadership
Designed Power BI dashboards with DAX calculations to visualize team performance metrics — enabling data-driven decisions across 150+ stakeholders
Conducted statistical analysis of call center metrics using Python (Pandas, NumPy), resulting in 6% increase in customer satisfaction
Built SQL-based reporting system to track irregular patterns, optimizing query performance through indexing and joins
Automated repetitive reporting tasks using Python scripts, reducing manual effort and ensuring data accuracy across business units
Performed sentiment analysis, created word clouds, and presented internal complaint findings to leadership
Facilitated training sessions for 50+ team members on data analysis best practices

projects.name: AutoApply
